'''Milli Bufflin''' was the wife of [[Huberdink Bufflin III]]. Both natives of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], the couple were vacationing on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Amfar/Legends|Amfar]] during the growing [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Due to the steep drop in tourism, the Bufflins found that they had many of the resorts facilities to themselves.

{{Char-stub}}
